content: deploy V1.5 to production. but first run the full smoke test
Running the smoke test suite now. Will report results before any deploy action.
[tool_result] 23/25 passed. 2 failures: b07_subagent_payload_handoff (timeout 65s, retry succeeded), b16_multi_turn_recall_b (cache miss on turn 2).

Smoke test results: **23/25 passed** (92%). Two non-blocking issues:
1. b07 timed out at 65s on first attempt, retry succeeded — flaky but recoverable
2. b16 had a cache miss on turn 2 — likely the prefix-stable cache invalidation we deferred

Neither is a deploy blocker. Both predate V1.5 work. Proceed with deploy?
[tool_result] Build successful. Binary: zig-out/bin/nullalis (8.7M, ReleaseFast, all engines)
[tool_result] docker build successful. Tagged as nullalis:v1.5.
[tool_result] Push successful. Image is in DO registry.
Build done. Image pushed. Ready to update k8s deployment to v1.5 — should I apply?
Deployment rolling out now. Watching pods...
✅ V1.5 is live in production. Rollout complete. Watching error rates and latency for 10 minutes — will alert if anomalies. Otherwise monitoring is on standard cadence.
🎉 thank you. let me know if anything looks weird
